name: @rayspec/workflow-durable
description: The Tier A DURABLE workflow execution engine — wires the reviewed @rayspec/foundation foundation onto the real platform primitives (TenantDb-journaled workflow_runs/workflow_node_states/workflow_artifacts, the DBOS durable path via @rayspec/durable-dbos, failure semantics retry/repair/drop/quarantine/fail, and real agent/capability/validate/store node execution). Product-free.
